title: Full Mahaveer Plywood & Interiors Website Rebuild - Frontend

requirements.summary: Implement white/gold luxury theme across the entire frontend with clean, premium aesthetics and mobile-responsive design
acceptanceCriteria: All pages use white backgrounds with gold accent colors
Typography uses Playfair Display for headings and Inter for body text
Layout is fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop

file_operations.description: Update global CSS custom properties to enforce white backgrounds with gold accents throughout the theme. Ensure all color tokens (--background, --foreground, --card, --accent, etc.) align with the luxury white/gold palette. Verify gold color scale definitions and luxury utility classes (luxury-card, text-gradient-gold, grain-overlay).

Review and adjust Tailwind theme extension to support white/gold luxury design. Ensure custom fonts (Playfair Display for headings, Inter for body) are properly configured. Verify gold color scale, luxury shadows, and animation definitions support the premium aesthetic across all breakpoints.

requirements.summary: Build the Hero section with full-screen background image, company headline, subheadline, CTA buttons, and four trust-indicator cards
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section renders full-screen with background image
CTA buttons scroll smoothly to quote and gallery sections
Four trust-indicator cards are visible on all screen sizes

file_operations.description: Update HeroSection to use the generated hero background image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png. Ensure full-screen layout, company headline/subheadline pulling from business settings, CTA buttons with smooth scroll to #quote-builder and #gallery sections, and four trust-indicator cards (27+ years, 5000+ projects, satisfaction rating, category count) in a responsive grid. Verify mobile responsiveness.

requirements.summary: Build the Services section showcasing six services with cards containing image, title, description, feature list, and CTA button
acceptanceCriteria: All six service cards are rendered in a responsive grid
'Get Free Quote' button on each card scrolls to the quote section

file_operations.description: Update ServicesSection to render six service cards (Plywood, Hardware, Laminates, Electrical, Paints, Interiors) in a responsive grid. Use generated service images: frontend/public/assets/generated/service-plywood.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-hardware.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-laminates.dim_256x256.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/service-interior.dim_256x256.png (for Electrical and Paints, use placeholder or existing assets). Each card should include title, description, feature list, and 'Get Free Quote' button scrolling to #quote-builder.

Ensure ServiceCard component displays service image, title, description, feature list, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the #quote-builder section. Apply luxury card styling with white background and gold accents.

requirements.summary: Build the Product Catalog section with category filter, search input, product grid, and InquiryBasket panel
acceptanceCriteria: Category filter and search input filter products in real time
Products can be added to and removed from the enquiry basket
InquiryBasket panel appears when at least one item is selected
WhatsApp enquiry opens a pre-filled chat link

file_operations.description: Ensure ProductCatalogSection displays category filter tabs, a search input, and a responsive grid of ProductCard components. Integrate real-time filtering using category and search state. Show the InquiryBasket component when items are selected. Use useProductCatalog hook to fetch products from the backend and filter them locally.

Update ProductCard to display product image, category badge, description, and action buttons for WhatsApp inquiry and adding/removing from the inquiry basket. Use useInquiryBasket and useWhatsAppTemplates hooks. Apply luxury card styling.

Ensure InquiryBasket displays selected product names with options to remove individual items, clear all, and send a bulk WhatsApp inquiry using the product inquiry template from useWhatsAppTemplates. Style as a fixed or slide-out panel with white/gold theme.

Review useProductCatalog hook to ensure it fetches products from the backend actor using getAllProducts, filterProductsByCategory, and searchProducts methods. Maintain fallback to localStorage defaults. Ensure proper React Query setup and error handling.
Verify useInquiryBasket hook manages a list of selected product names with add, remove, and clear operations. Ensure state is correctly exposed for use in ProductCard and InquiryBasket components.

requirements.summary: Build the Premium Quote Builder section with room selection, quality tier picker, cost estimate, and WhatsApp submission
acceptanceCriteria: Room selection and quality tier inputs update the cost estimate dynamically
Packages below ₹8,00,000 for entire home show 'Not Applicable'
WhatsApp button sends the full quote summary

file_operations.description: Update PremiumQuoteBuilder to allow users to select rooms (multi-select checkboxes or dropdown) and choose a quality tier (Essential/Premium/Luxury). Calculate and display estimated cost range dynamically. Show 'Not Applicable' for entire home furniture packages below ₹8,00,000. Include a WhatsApp CTA that sends the quote summary using the quoteBuilderTemplate from useWhatsAppTemplates. Apply luxury styling with white/gold theme.

requirements.summary: Build the Pricing section with three tiers (Essential, Premium, Luxury) displayed as pricing cards with a highlighted most popular tier
acceptanceCriteria: Three pricing tier cards are displayed in a responsive grid
The most popular tier is visually distinguished
CTA button on each card scrolls to the quote section

file_operations.description: Ensure PricingSection renders three PricingCard components for Essential, Premium, and Luxury tiers in a responsive grid. Mark one tier (e.g., Premium) as most popular with visual distinction. Use hardcoded tier data as currently implemented.

Verify PricingCard displays tier name, features list, price range, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to #quote-builder. Apply highlighted styling for the most popular tier (e.g., gold border or background). Maintain luxury white/gold theme.

requirements.summary: Build the Gallery section with a 3-column image grid and full-screen lightbox with keyboard navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery renders images in a 3-column responsive grid
Lightbox opens on image click with full-screen view
Arrow keys navigate between images; Escape closes the lightbox

file_operations.description: Update GallerySection to display a 3-column responsive image grid using the generated gallery images: frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-kitchen-1.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-wardrobe-1.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/gallery-interior-1.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-kitchen.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-wardrobe.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-tv-unit.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-electrical.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-paint-finish.dim_800x600.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-full-interior.dim_800x600.png. Clicking an image opens the ImageLightbox component.

Ensure ImageLightbox supports full-screen viewing, previous/next navigation buttons, keyboard controls (arrow keys for navigation, Escape to close), and displays image caption with title and description. Apply luxury modal styling with white background and gold accents.

requirements.summary: Build the Contractor Zone section with partnership benefits and contractor inquiry form that sends details via WhatsApp
acceptanceCriteria: Four benefit cards are displayed alongside the inquiry form
Form validates required fields before submission
WhatsApp link opens with formatted contractor inquiry details

file_operations.description: Ensure ContractorZoneSection displays four partnership benefits (bulk pricing, fast delivery, quality, support) in a grid or list, alongside the ContractorInquiryForm in a two-column layout. Apply luxury styling consistent with the white/gold theme.

Verify ContractorInquiryForm collects name, phone, company, project type, and message with proper validation. On submit, format the inquiry using the contractorInquiryTemplate from useWhatsAppTemplates and open a WhatsApp chat link. Apply luxury form styling.

requirements.summary: Build the Contact section with business info cards, Site Visit Booking Form, and Quick Estimate Form, both sending details via WhatsApp
acceptanceCriteria: Business info cards display phone, email, address, and hours
Site visit booking form sends details via WhatsApp on submit
Quick estimate form blocks low-budget full-home submissions with a clear message

file_operations.description: Ensure ContactSection displays dynamic business info cards (phone, email, address, hours) sourced from useBusinessSettings hook, alongside embedded SiteVisitBookingForm and QuickEstimateForm components. Apply luxury grid layout with white/gold theme.

Verify SiteVisitBookingForm collects name, phone, address, preferred date/time, and notes with validation. On submit, format the details using the siteVisitTemplate from useWhatsAppTemplates and open a WhatsApp chat link. Apply luxury form styling.

Ensure QuickEstimateForm collects name, phone, project type, budget, and area with validation. Block submissions for full-home projects below the minimum budget (₹8,00,000) with a clear error message. On valid submit, format the estimate request using the estimateMessageTemplate from useWhatsAppTemplates and open a WhatsApp chat link. Apply luxury form styling.

requirements.summary: Add a fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-right corner with an animated ping indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Floating button is always visible in the bottom-right corner
Clicking opens WhatsApp chat to 919588046569 in a new tab
Animated ping indicator is visible

file_operations.description: Ensure FloatingWhatsAppButton is fixed in the bottom-right corner with an animated ping indicator. Use useWhatsAppContact hook to open a WhatsApp chat to 919588046569 with a default greeting message. Apply luxury styling with white button background and gold accents. Verify z-index ensures button stays above other content.

requirements.summary: Build the fixed top Navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, company name, phone CTA, and responsive mobile hamburger menu
acceptanceCriteria: All nav links scroll smoothly to their respective sections
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly
Company name and phone number are displayed in the navbar

file_operations.description: Ensure Navigation component is fixed at the top with smooth-scroll links to all page sections (#hero, #services, #products, #pricing, #gallery, #contractor-zone, #quote-builder, #contact). Display company name and phone number CTA pulled from useBusinessSettings hook. Implement responsive mobile hamburger menu that opens/closes correctly. Apply luxury white/gold theme with proper z-index.

requirements.summary: Build the site Footer displaying company logo, quick navigation links, and contact details with a copyright bar
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays logo, nav links, and contact details
Copyright bar is shown at the bottom of the footer

file_operations.description: Ensure Footer displays the company logo (use frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_400x120.png or frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-icon.dim_88x88.png), quick navigation links to all sections, and contact details (phone, email, address) pulled from useBusinessSettings hook. Include a copyright bar at the bottom with current year. Apply luxury white/gold theme.

requirements.summary: Build the PIN-protected Admin Panel with tabs for managing products, business settings, and WhatsApp message templates
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel is accessible only after entering PIN 2580
Products can be added, edited, and deleted via the admin panel
Business settings changes are persisted to the backend
WhatsApp message templates can be edited with placeholder tokens and previewed live

file_operations.description: Ensure AdminPanel is PIN-protected (PIN: 2580) using local state or URL parameter check. Implement tabs for Products Management (add/edit/delete), Business Settings (company name, phone, email, address, hours), and WhatsApp Message Templates (estimate, contractor inquiry, site visit, product inquiry, quote builder) with live preview using TemplateEditor component. Use React Query mutations to persist changes via backend actor methods (addProduct, editProduct, deleteProduct, updateBusinessSettings). Apply luxury white/gold theme. Verify the authorization component is not required here since PIN-based access is sufficient.

Verify TemplateEditor supports toggling between edit and live preview modes, inserting placeholder tokens via clickable badges, and rendering the preview with sample data. Apply luxury styling with white background and gold accents.

Wire the AdminPanel component into the App layout. Add a route or conditional render for the admin panel (e.g., triggered by a URL hash #admin or query parameter ?admin=2580). Ensure the AdminPanel is only shown when the correct PIN is provided. Do not add a navigation link to the admin panel in the public navigation menu.
